caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt and a dark patterned vest, stands before a microphone, singing or speaking in a room with brown slatted walls. He is positioned behind a group of people who are seen from the back, including several women with blonde and brown hair; one woman wears a purple garment. A black object, possibly a drum or equipment case, sits on a surface behind the people. In the lower right of the scene, the text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters. Across the sequence, the man's facial expression and mouth position shift slightly as he speaks or sings, and his right arm moves subtly. The audience members remain relatively still, and the overall setting and camera angle remain constant.
